description: Seed prompts for benchmarking ROBOPORT agents and crews. Grouped by target.

prompts.prompt: Find me 5-10 senior data engineering jobs in Remote-US posted in the last week. I have HIPAA experience and prefer health-tech.
Find principal-level platform engineering roles, any location, paying above $300K total comp. I'm open to startups.
Find remote DevRel jobs at AI infra companies. I have strong writing samples and 2 years of API work.
Aggregate machine learning engineer postings across Indeed, LinkedIn, and Dice for the SF Bay Area, posted in the last 30 days.
Read this JD and tell me what regulatory frameworks are implied. Quote the JD for every finding.
Tailor my master resume to this JD. Do not invent any experience.
Estimate the comp band for this Staff Data Engineer role in NYC.
Clean this CSV: drop rows with malformed dates, normalize encodings to UTF-8, dedupe by (email, company), document every transform.
Write a 1-page memo to the CTO summarizing this dataset. Cite every number.
Find Quantum Sandwich Architect jobs (this should return 0 results — testing graceful degrade).
